name: Favorite Choc. Chip Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together Crisco, light brown sugar, granulated sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, and salt until creamy.
2. Add flour, salt, baking soda, and vanilla to the mixture; mix well.
3. Gradually add hot water, oats, and chocolate chips to the dough. Stir until all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Drop rounded spoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes.
6. Optional: For softer cookies, place an apple wedge in the oven with them while baking.
